public_reputation: Controller of ore tallies, labor shifts, and industrial accountability at Ironhold Quarry.
appearance: Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow carries the marks of pit comptroller in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a pit comptroller whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Ironhold Quarry.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of pit comptroller in and around Ironhold Quarry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Ironhold Quarry while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Ironhold Quarry.
Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a pit comptroller.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow is readable as a pit comptroller tied to Ironhold Quarry.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ironhold Quarry: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow presents as someone shaped by the duties of a pit comptroller and the daily pressures of Ironhold Quarry.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a pit comptroller, and proof that strangers will not make Ironhold Quarry harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a pit comptroller too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow always knows more about Ironhold Quarry than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to pit comptroller duties in Ironhold Quarry.
social_texture: Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Ironhold Quarry, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Pit touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Pit Comptroller Jast Merrow when the party needs a socially grounded face for Ironhold Quarry: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
